name: council
description: Three-council audit protocol for analytical research: math-god-mode (currently-active mathematicians + applied controls people), OG-math-experts (historical legends + control-theory founders + estimation/ODE classics), and controls-expert-reviewer (present-day engineering authorities). All three enforce the council-log protocol that reads notes/council-log.md before any audit and classifies every finding as NEW / RECURRING-UNFIXED / CONFLICT-WITH-PRIOR-SIGNOFF.
